This directory contains vendored copies of third-party JavaScript
libraries used by the Wiki Engine UI. All libraries are MIT-licensed.

react (18.x)          — https://github.com/facebook/react
react-dom (18.x)     — https://github.com/facebook/react
@babel/standalone    — https://github.com/babel/babel

Full license texts: https://github.com/facebook/react/blob/main/LICENSE
                    https://github.com/babel/babel/blob/main/LICENSE
